title: DDecadent Molten Charred Parmesan Pasta
description: A festive Tunisian dish featuring charred pasta, parmesan cheese, and a miso-marinate that is both indulgent and jain-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and red pepper flakes to the pan, cooking for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Cut pasta into bite-sized pieces and add them to the pan with the miso paste. Toss well to coat.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once cooked through, remove from heat and set aside.
To make the parmesan cheese sauce, sprinkle parmesan over the pasta and mix gently.
Gently warm the sauce without letting it boil.
Top each serving with a few fresh parsley leaves for garnish.
